commit.message:
LU-17638 lnet: debug export breakage

Revert bit by bit to find out why maloo testbed breaks things.
Try a NLM_F_DUMP flag for NI handling.

Change-Id: Ied19fd9ce49e5c23006bec5e89bb0536c081bc8f
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
